code:
import io
import string

let haystack = io.read_line().ok_or("missing haystack")
let needle = io.read_line().ok_or("missing needle")

match haystack
when Ok(h)
  match needle
  when Ok(n)
    if string.contains(h, n)
      print("YES")
    else
      print("NO")
    end
  when Err(_)
    print("NO")
  end
when Err(_)
  print("NO")
end
